review_protocol.inclusion: at least one unambiguous statistical or probabilistic occurrence in the article body
exclusion: symbols such as H0 or p unless their statistical meaning is explicit
review_protocol.adjudication: manual review of all initially uncertain assignments plus forced correction of known false positives and false negatives
